name: graphtide
description: Graph intelligence library for ingesting documents, building typed knowledge graphs, and querying them with LLMs
author: Julius Haring

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && mkdir -p dist/cjs && cp scripts/cjs-package.json dist/cjs/package.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json
scripts.fl: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.release:initial: npm run release:preflight && commit-and-tag-version --release-as 0.1.0 && npm publish
scripts.release: npm run release:preflight && commit-and-tag-version && npm publish
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:preflight && commit-and-tag-version --release-as patch && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:preflight && commit-and-tag-version --release-as minor && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm run release:preflight && commit-and-tag-version --release-as major && npm publish
